title: Scan4D RoomPlan JSON Schema
description: Per-scan RoomPlan output written to `roomplan.json` within the scan directory and bundled into the Scan4D export zip. Contains oriented bounding boxes for detected surfaces (walls, floors, doors, windows, openings) and objects (tables, chairs, etc.) from Apple's RoomPlan API. Transforms are in the scan's ARKit world coordinate space (same as the mesh OBJ).

surfaces.description: Detected planar surfaces: walls, floors, doors, windows, and openings.

surface.description: An oriented bounding box for a detected planar surface.

id.description: Unique identifier for this surface (from CapturedRoom.Surface.identifier).

dimensions.description: Bounding box size in meters (local space, before transform).

transform.description: 4x4 transform placing the surface in world space (column-major, 16 floats).

object.description: An oriented bounding box for a detected 3D object.

id.description: Unique identifier for this object (from CapturedRoom.Object.identifier).

dimensions.description: Bounding box size in meters (local space, before transform).

transform.description: 4x4 transform placing the object in world space (column-major, 16 floats).

width.description: Extent along the local X axis (meters).

height.description: Extent along the local Y axis (meters).

depth.description: Extent along the local Z axis (meters).

flatMatrix4x4.description: A 4x4 matrix flattened to 16 floats in column-major order: [c0r0, c0r1, c0r2, c0r3, c1r0, c1r1, c1r2, c1r3, c2r0, c2r1, c2r2, c2r3, c3r0, c3r1, c3r2, c3r3]. Matches the convention used by stitching.json and transforms.json.
